standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to spoken English in basic and simple guided contexts

indicators: Respond to simple greetings (Hello, goodbye, how are you?)
Respond to simple commands (sit down; stand up)
Respond to number and alphabet rhymes with movement
Recite nursery rhymes in English with teacher/peers

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: إظهار التعرف على الكلمات الإنجليزية الأساسية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Demonstrate recognition of basic English words
indicators: Identify basic words related to classroom objects, family, colors, shapes, food and animals
Point to objects, colors or shapes named by the teacher

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير التعرف على الأبجدية الإنجليزية والكلمات البسيطة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop recognition of the English alphabet and simple words
indicators: Identify the letters of the English alphabet by pronouncing them in simple guided contexts
Recite rhymes and songs individually and in groups

standards.nameAr: إنتاج كلمات بسيطة وعبارات تواصلية بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Produce basic words and simple communicative utterances

learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Produce single words and formulaic utterances
indicators: Say single words that describe family, familiar class objects and days of the week with guidance
Engage in simple guided social interactions (Hello! My name is Ahmad. I am five years old.)
Recite cardinal numbers
Use and respond to simple imperatives individually and in groups (Sit down! Stand up!)

standards.nameAr: قراءة وفهم اللغة الإنجليزية المكتوبة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Read to understand written English in basic and simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير استراتيجيات ما قبل القراءة (إمساك الكتاب بشكل صحيح، تمييز الحروف والكلمات والمسافات، تخمين القصة من الصور)
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop pre-reading strategies (holding a book correctly, distinguishing letters, words and spaces, guessing story from pictures)
indicators: Hold a book correctly
Distinguish pictures from print
Establish left-to-right, top-to-bottom direction of reading
Recognize spaces between words
Distinguish between spaces, letters and words
Use pictures and other visual cues to better understand simple written material
Remember songs, music and movement related to certain letters, sounds, syllables and words

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير التعرف على حروف الأبجدية الإنجليزية ومقابلاتها الصوتية وتركيباتها في الكلمات الأساسية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop recognition of the letters of the English alphabet, their phonic counterpart(s) and their combinations in basic words
indicators: Identify the letters of the English alphabet by their names, sounds and shapes
Distinguish between small and capital letters
Learn alphabet rhymes and songs with visual aids and actions
Use letter-sound knowledge of single consonants (hard and soft sounds), consonant blends and digraphs.
Decode phonetically regular words (e.g., cat, go, black), independent of context
Identify simple familiar sight words with correct pronunciation and relate them to familiar objects from the environment.

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المكتوبة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to written English in basic and simple guided contexts

indicators: Recognize one's own name
Match simple words with pictures
Match words that begin or end with the same letter or sound
Distinguish reading-related vocabulary (book, page, line, word, title, next, turn over)
Demonstrate understanding of words through participation in games (I Spy, Bingo)

standards.nameEn: Write in basic and simple guided contexts

indicators: Establish left-to-right, top-to-bottom direction of writing
Develop a comfortable grip of pencils and crayons
Write letters of the English alphabet, both capital and small
Participate in simple writing activities with teacher and peers (e.g., trace the letter or the shape)
Write his/her name

standards.nameAr: التعرف على النصوص المرئية في سياقات موجهة بسيطة واستخدام الموسيقى والأغاني والحركة للمساعدة في الفهم
standards.nameEn: Recognize visual texts in basic and simple guided contexts and using music, songs and movement to aid comprehension

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: البدء بالتعرف على أن اللغة المرئية تنقل معنى
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Begin to recognize that visual language conveys meaning
indicators: Recognize own name identify colors, shapes, symbols and images in visual texts
Look at books independently
Begin to attend to visual information showing understanding through play, gestures and facial expressions
View picture books and talk about what they see

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: البدء بتفسير النصوص المرئية والاستجابة لها
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Begin to interpret and respond to visual texts
indicators: Repeat/Echo single words
